name: Class Table
description: Five Parsecs From Home character class table (pp.26-27)

1-5.name: Working Class
1-5.description: Hard-working common folk with practical wisdom and good fortune.

6-9.name: Technician
6-9.description: Skilled in maintaining and repairing equipment.

10-13.name: Scientist
10-13.description: Trained in research and analysis of complex problems.

14-17.name: Hacker
14-17.description: Expert at infiltrating computer systems, has made enemies.

18-22.name: Soldier
18-22.description: Professional military training and some saved pay.

23-27.name: Mercenary
23-27.description: Guns for hire, well-equipped for combat.

28-32.name: Agitator
28-32.description: Political activist who has made powerful enemies.

33-36.name: Primitive
33-36.description: From a pre-technological culture, fast and resourceful.

37-40.name: Artist
37-40.description: Creative professional with some income from their work.

41-44.name: Negotiator
41-44.description: Skilled at making deals and building relationships.

50-54.name: Starship Crew
50-54.description: Worked aboard starships, familiar with space operations.

55-58.name: Petty Criminal
55-58.description: Small-time crook who learned to run fast.

59-63.name: Ganger
59-63.description: Street gang member, always alert for trouble.

64-67.name: Scoundrel
64-67.description: Charming rogue who relies on quick escapes.

68-71.name: Enforcer
68-71.description: Muscle for hire, has connections to employers.

72-75.name: Special Agent
72-75.description: Covert operative with agency backing and special equipment.

76-79.name: Troubleshooter
76-79.description: Problem solver who responds quickly to situations.

80-83.name: Bounty Hunter
80-83.description: Tracks down fugitives, has leads on potential targets.

84-88.name: Nomad
84-88.description: Wanderer who has collected useful equipment on travels.

89-92.name: Explorer
89-92.description: Experienced traveler with knowledge gained from adventures.

93-96.name: Punk
93-96.description: Anti-establishment rebel with experience and enemies.

97-100.name: Scavenger
97-100.description: Expert at finding valuable items, knows where to look.
